title: 像素城_魔法核心整合包【PixelCity_MagicCore Modpack】
description: 《像素城》魔法核心整合包（1.21.11版），专注生存红石工程。为自动化系统、多人性能优化及技术向Minecraft玩法量身打造。PixelCity MagicCore Modpack (1.21.11) for Survival Redstone Engineering. Optimized for automation systems, multiplayer performance, and technical Minecraft gameplay.
body:
# PixelCity_Survival Modpack (1.21.11)
**Vanilla Redstone Optimization**

**Performance-focused pack for PixelCity Server, enhancing survival mechanics without gameplay overhauls**

## ✨ Core Features
### ⚡ Industrial Redstone Performance
- Sodium + Lithium optimization core
- 100+ chunk redstone operation at 60 FPS++
- Entity culling: Lag-free mass storage systems
### 🛠️ Engineering Toolkit
- **Tweakeroo**: Precision block alignment  
- **Chest Tracker**: Storage network monitoring  
- **Spawner Analyzer**: Mob farm efficiency scanner  
### 🌇 Server Integration
- GriefPrevention/Economy plugin compatibility  
- /warp industrial_district command  
- Shared resource coordinate database  
### 🎯 Vanilla+ Enhancements
- Dynamic lighting for underground builds  
- Quick craft calculators for complex recipes  
- Tick rate control tools
